pr.title: Add huh interactive prompts for gx init and modify
pr.body: ## Summary Integrates [Charm huh v2](https://github.com/charmbracelet/huh) for interactive gx prompts on real terminals, building on the Lip Gloss styling work. ## Changes - New `internal/prompt` package: - **TTY**: huh forms with Charm theme - **Pipes / CI**: legacy line-based prompts (unchanged behavior for tests and scripts) - **`gx init`**: single form for name + email (with validation) - **`gx modify`**: filterable select list of changes (↑↓, type to filter, ctrl+c to cancel) - Environment controls: - `GX_PLAIN_PROMPTS=1` — force legacy stdin prompts - `GX_ACCESSIBLE=1` or `ACCESSIBLE=1` — huh accessible mode (plain prompts for screen readers) - Fixes shared `bufio.Reader` when multiple legacy prompts read from the same `io.Reader` ## Depends on - Lip Gloss CLI styling (#5) — this branch is based on `cursor/lipgloss-styling-80ad` ## Testing - `go test ./...`
pr.author: joelachance
